info.title: CleanQuant — Point-in-Time Alternative Data
info.description: Backtest-ready alternative data with TRUE point-in-time: add ?as_of=YYYY-MM-DD and every endpoint returns only what was actually known on that date — no look-ahead bias. CFTC COT positioning (public domain) and OECD-via-FRED macro interest rates. Cleaned, ISO-timestamped. JSON or CSV. Datasets are limited to redistribution-clean public sources.

get.description: List all available datasets and their markets and currencies. No parameters.
CFTC speculator net positioning (public domain). With ?as_of=, returns only reports already PUBLISHED by that date (uses real release lag) — true point-in-time.

parameters.name: as_of
parameters.description: Point-in-time: only reports published on/before this date

get.description: 3-month interbank rates and USD differential (OECD via FRED; © OECD, citation required — see the 'attribution' field in the response). ?as_of= applies a publication lag (true ALFRED vintages coming soon).
